title: antrophyum lanceolatum var. feei
intro: Antrophyum lanceolatum var. feei, also known as the Fee's Ruffled Fan Fern, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Antrophyum lanceolatum var. feei, often in the form of tea or infusions, are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
